description: Native-resolution 30-step prompt/seed cases for validating Underpaint Juggernaut SDXL policies.

cases.prompt: a cozy reading nook with a green velvet chair, a small wooden table, warm window light, realistic photo
a macro photograph of dew on a red maple leaf resting on dark slate, shallow depth of field
a cinematic wide photo of a small sailboat on a misty lake at sunrise, soft natural light
